Access Configuration Updates Delayed
updates.meta: Resolved / Minor / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Access Configuration Updates Delayed
updates.meta: Monitoring / Minor / Resolved / A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.

updates.title: Access Configuration Updates Delayed
updates.meta: Investigating / Minor / Resolved / Access configuration changes are experiencing delays propagating to the edge. Existing configurations and logins are not impacted.

updates.title: Intermittent connectivity issues in Ashburn, VA
updates.meta: Resolved / Minor / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Intermittent connectivity issues in Ashburn, VA
updates.meta: Monitoring / Minor / Resolved / Cloudflare investigated intermittent connectivity issues in Ashburn, VA. A fix for this issue was implemented and we are currently monitoring the results. We will update the status once the issue is resolved.

updates.title: Issues with 1.1.1.1 public resolver in North America
updates.meta: Resolved / Minor / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Issues with 1.1.1.1 public resolver in North America
updates.meta: Investigating / Minor / Resolved / Cloudflare is aware of, and investigating, an issue which potentially impacts multiple users in North America that use 1.1.1.1 public resolver. Further detail will be provided as more information becomes available.
